related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de poder ser capaç de suportar un nombre il·limitat de connexions al mateix temps.
related_requirements.explanation: The Microservices Architecture allows the system to scale horizontally by adding more instances of services like Web Socket and Core, enabling it to handle an unlimited number of simultaneous connections.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema escala de forma dinàmica amb els canvis de connexions simultànies.
related_requirements.explanation: Each microservice (e.g., Web Socket, Core) can be independently scaled based on demand, allowing the system to dynamically adjust its capacity in response to changes in concurrent connections.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de poder créixer en capacitat quan el volum de dades augmenti.
related_requirements.explanation: As data volume increases, individual microservices such as the Analytic Module or Cloud Services can be scaled independently to accommodate the growing data processing needs.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema escala de manera automàtica a la vegada que van augmentant les dades.
related_requirements.explanation: The Microservices Architecture supports auto-scaling capabilities, particularly for components like Cloud Services and Analytic Module, which can automatically adjust resources as data volume grows.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de respondre ràpidament quan l’usuari realitzi alguna acció.
related_requirements.explanation: The Client-Server Architecture ensures that client requests are routed efficiently through the API Gateway, minimizing latency and enabling rapid responses to user actions.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema respon a qualsevol acció de l’usuari en menys de 5 segons.
related_requirements.explanation: By separating client and server responsibilities, the system can optimize server-side processing and communication protocols (HTTP/TCP) to ensure all user actions are responded to within the specified time frame.

related_requirements.requirement: La plataforma de Waapiti s’utilitza durant les 24 hores del dia i, per tant, ha d’estar disponible per tots els usuaris en tot moment.
related_requirements.explanation: The Client-Server Architecture supports continuous availability by allowing clients to interact with the backend services (API Gateway, Core) at any time, ensuring 24/7 accessibility.

related_requirements.requirement: Qualsevol usuari ha de poder accedir a la plataforma durant qualsevol moment del dia. Excepte en les actualitzacions programades.
related_requirements.explanation: This architecture enables seamless access for users by decoupling client interactions from server-side operations, allowing the system to remain available except during planned maintenance.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de ser sempre disponible en tot moment, excepte alguna puntualitat, com pot ser una actualització.
related_requirements.explanation: The Layered Architecture enhances system availability by isolating concerns into distinct layers (Presentation, Business Logic, Data). This modularity allows updates to one layer without affecting others, minimizing downtime.

related_requirements.requirement: Els usuaris sense permís no poden accedir a les dades de les quals no tenen permís.
related_requirements.explanation: The separation of layers ensures that access control logic is centralized in the Business Logic Layer (Core), enforcing permissions and preventing unauthorized access to data.

related_requirements.requirement: La informació confidencial dels usuaris ha d’estar protegida per tal de garantir la seva privacitat.
related_requirements.explanation: The Layered Architecture facilitates secure data handling by isolating sensitive data storage (Database) and processing (Analytic Module) in separate layers, enabling robust privacy controls.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de respondre ràpidament quan l’usuari realitzi alguna acció.
related_requirements.explanation: The API Gateway handles authentication and routing of client requests efficiently, reducing latency and ensuring rapid responses to user actions.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema respon a qualsevol acció de l’usuari en menys de 5 segons.
related_requirements.explanation: By acting as a single entry point, the API Gateway optimizes request processing and load balancing, ensuring all user actions are responded to within the required timeframe.

related_requirements.requirement: Com a Qualsevol tipus d’usuari, vull Que el sistema guardi els playlogs dels players Per Poder tenir constància dels continguts reproduïts en els diferents players
related_requirements.explanation: The API Gateway routes player-generated playlog data to the Web Socket service, ensuring accurate logging and tracking of content playback.

related_requirements.requirement: Com a Qualsevol tipus d’usuari, vull Que el sistema guardi les connexions dels players Per Poder tenir constància de quins players estan connectats a cada hora
related_requirements.explanation: The API Gateway forwards player connection status data to the Web Socket service, enabling the system to track and log player connectivity.

related_requirements.requirement: Com a Qualsevol tipus d’usuari, vull Que el sistema guardi les accions realitzades sobre la plataforma Per Poder tenir constància de quines accions s’han realitzat sobre la platforma
related_requirements.explanation: The API Gateway captures and routes user actions to the Core service, ensuring accurate logging and tracking of platform activities.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de poder ser capaç de suportar un nombre il·limitat de connexions al mateix temps.
related_requirements.explanation: The Web Socket component uses bidirectional communication via WebSocket protocol to manage real-time player connections, enabling the system to support an unlimited number of simultaneous connections.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema escala de forma dinàmica amb els canvis de connexions simultànies.
related_requirements.explanation: The Web Socket service can be scaled independently to handle dynamic changes in concurrent player connections, ensuring the system remains responsive under varying loads.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema ha de poder créixer en capacitat quan el volum de dades augmenti.
related_requirements.explanation: As data volume increases, the Web Socket service can process and forward more data to the Cloud Services, supporting the system's growth in data handling capacity.

related_requirements.requirement: El sistema escala de manera automàtica a la vegada que van augmentant les dades.
related_requirements.explanation: The Web Socket service can automatically scale its resources to handle increasing data volumes, ensuring seamless performance as data grows.

related_requirements.requirement: Les connexions solament podran tenir dos estats: connectat o no connectat.
related_requirements.explanation: The Web Socket service uses the Observer pattern to manage player connection states, ensuring only two possible states (connected or disconnected) are tracked.

related_requirements.requirement: Els usuaris sense permís no poden accedir a les dades de les quals no tenen permís.
related_requirements.explanation: The Core service enforces user authentication and authorization, ensuring that only users with appropriate permissions can access specific data.

related_requirements.requirement: La informació confidencial dels usuaris ha d’estar protegida per tal de garantir la seva privacitat.
related_requirements.explanation: The Core service interacts with the Database to store and retrieve user data securely, implementing access controls to protect confidential information.

related_requirements.explanation: The Repository Pattern abstracts data access logic, allowing the Analytic Module to consistently query and process playlog data from the data lake.

related_requirements.explanation: The Strategy Pattern allows the Analytic Module to switch between different algorithms for analyzing playlogs, enabling flexible and efficient data processing.
